findings.message: File ends without a trailing '---' separator after the Portfolio section. The three other category sections each have a trailing '---', but Portfolio (the last section) does not.
findings.fix: Add '---' on a new line after the last '### Антипаттерны' placeholder comment in the Portfolio section, for structural consistency with Landing, Webapp, and Admin sections.

summary: File meets all acceptance criteria from task-2. Four category sections (Landing, Webapp, Admin, Portfolio) are present at H2 level. Each category contains exactly three H3 subsections (Предпочтения, Что работало, Антипаттерны) with placeholder comments and no real content — correct scaffold behavior. Append-only mode is documented in the file header (lines 6-7), consistent with Decision 3 from tech-spec. Format is consistent with the color-psychology.md reference file (no frontmatter, prose header, horizontal rule separators). One minor cosmetic issue: the Portfolio section lacks the trailing '---' that the other three sections have.
